sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87203" key="proeknitrwte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεκ-νιτρωτέον</orth>, <sense id="n87203.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must clean beforehand,</tr_> Id.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:13:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.13.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
